backend/main.mo: Actor defines budget, expense, notes, user profiles, and access control logic with storage maps and role‑based authorization.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files for reference.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React app with favicon and root container.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up router, React Query, theme provider, and profile‑based auth flow including ProfileSetup gating.
frontend/src/components/BudgetPreview.ts: Displays a static budget overview with totals, category breakdowns, and spending predictions using UI components.
frontend/src/components/ChatAssistant.ts: Interactive chat assistant handling user messages, generating contextual responses, and auto‑scrolling conversation history.
frontend/src/components/CreateTripDialog: Dialog form for creating trips using user profile suggestions and generating trip objects with images.
frontend/src/components/DestinationExplo: Sorts destinations by user interest match and displays them with images, badges, icons, and highlights.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with logo, theme toggle, user menu, and logout handling.
frontend/src/components/HotelSuggestions: Fetches mock hotel data for a destination and displays hotel cards with ratings, prices, and amenities.
Provides UI to select origins and destinations, calculate distance, and show an embedded map view.
frontend/src/components/NotificationCent: Manages and displays user notifications with icons, read states, and dismissal actions.
frontend/src/components/PopularDestinati: Lists destinations with filtering and sorting, allowing users to select a destination for context.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form component for collecting user profile data including name, email, budget, interests, and preferred destinations, then saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/TrafficVisualiza: Fetches and displays mock real-time traffic data and route options for a destination with visual indicators and route metrics.
frontend/src/components/TransportCompari: Compares transport options between an origin and selected destination using distance-based calculations to show duration, cost, and availability.
frontend/src/components/TripBudget.tsx: Manages trip expenses and budgets, allowing users to add expenses, set category budgets, and view spending summaries.
frontend/src/components/TripCard.tsx: Displays a trip preview card with image, dates, destination info, and actions to view details or delete the trip.
frontend/src/components/TripDetailsDialo: Modal dialog showing trip overview, budget, and notes tabs, with dynamic tab switching for a selected trip.
frontend/src/components/TripManager.tsx: Manages creation, display, and deletion of trips using local storage and renders trip cards and a create-trip dialog.
frontend/src/components/TripNotes.tsx: Displays, creates, and deletes categorized trip notes via query hooks and a modal form.
frontend/src/components/TripOverview.tsx: Shows trip details including image, dates, duration, destination, and description.
frontend/src/components/WeatherWidget.ts: Fetches and displays current weather and forecast for the selected destination with loading and error states.
frontend/src/contexts/DestinationContext: Provides global context for selected destination and origin information with setters.
frontend/src/data/destinations.ts: Defines the Destination interface and a preset list of destination objects with metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeocode.ts: Provides debounced geocoding lookup for city names using OpenStreetMap and returns location data.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login, logout, and identity state handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, budgets, expenses, and travel notes through the backend actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Provides a hook that tracks the user's reduced motion preference via a media query.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeatherForecast.ts: Fetches weather data from Open-Meteo and formats current conditions, multi-day forecasts, and alerts into a structured query result.
frontend/src/index.css: Contains Tailwind base setup, custom CSS variables, dark theme overrides, animations, and utility classes for UI styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app by rendering it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders the main dashboard with navigation tabs and loads user profile and identity to display trip, destination, weather, transport, map, and assistant modules.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Implements the animated, interactive homepage with motion effects, login handling, auto‑redirect, parallax visuals, and stats counters.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login screen with branding, feature cards, imagery, and redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/assistantRules.ts: Defines rule‑based responses for the local travel assistant based on message keywords and optional context.
frontend/src/utils/distance.ts: Provides a haversine‑formula distance calculator for two latitude/longitude coordinates.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Exports helpers for formatting distances and currency values using Intl.NumberFormat.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theming, animations, container settings, and plugins for typography, queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature definitions, requirements, and architectural notes for the Route Rover app.
